name: introspection-over-write-primitive
description: Layer introspection/maintenance modules on top of write-side primitives without coupling. src/core/apply-backup.ts (list/stats/prune over backups dir) is queried by am doctor and swept by am apply post-success; atomic-write.ts owns the per-write backup primitive. Two layers, one direction — introspection reads the primitive's on-disk layout. Each layer reimplements its small slice of path logic so the dependency surface stays clean. Best-effort prune wrapped in try/catch surfaces via warn() and never blocks the apply.

name: env-var-override-pattern
description: Encapsulate process.env reads in private helpers (envMaxCount/envMaxAgeDays) inside the operation function rather than at call sites. Helpers parse with Number.parseInt(raw, 10), fall back to default on empty / NaN / negative. Call sites stay parameter-free; option overrides take precedence via options.foo ?? envFoo(). Used in src/core/apply-backup.ts for AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX and AM_APPLY_BACKUP_MAX_AGE.

name: test-injection-seam-factory
description: Test injection seam pattern for swappable factories: pair a module-level let-binding (e.g. acpClientFactory) with an exported __setXForTests(fn|null) that resets to the real impl when called with null. Use this instead of mock.module() when a side-effecting dependency (e.g. createAcpClient) must be replaced for test observability without spawning real subprocesses. Mirrors __setDryRunWhichFnForTests in src/commands/run.ts and avoids cross-test leakage.
